name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Devspace
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Summary

Briefly describe the idea.

## Problem

What workflow, limitation, or frustration does this address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior or UX you want.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, screenshots, or mockups if helpful.
